bubble.greeting.zh: 嗨，我是 BB 👋 按 {hotkey} 开始说话
bubble.greeting.en: Hi, I'm BB 👋 press {hotkey} to talk

msg.signin_browser.zh: 请在弹出的浏览器中完成 Azure 登录…
msg.signin_browser.en: Complete the Azure sign-in in the browser window…

msg.not_signed_in.zh: 未登录 Azure：点击下方『登录 Azure』即可开始。
msg.not_signed_in.en: Not signed in to Azure: click “Sign in to Azure” below to start.

msg.pick_model_first.zh: 请先选择或输入一个本地模型名称。
msg.pick_model_first.en: Please select or type a local model name first.

msg.downloading_model.zh: 正在下载模型 {name}（首次较慢，请稍候）…
msg.downloading_model.en: Downloading model {name} (first time is slow, please wait)…

msg.model_no_local_engine.zh: 此安装包为 Azure 精简版，未内置本地 Whisper 引擎，无法下载模型。请改用完整版（含离线 Whisper）。
msg.model_no_local_engine.en: This build is the lean Azure edition without a bundled local Whisper engine, so models can't be downloaded. Please use the Full edition (with offline Whisper).

msg.local_engine_missing.zh: 此安装包为 Azure 精简版，未内置本地 Whisper 引擎。请在设置中使用 azure 后端，或用 BB_INCLUDE_LOCAL=1 重新打包。
msg.local_engine_missing.en: This build is the lean Azure edition without a bundled local Whisper engine. Use the azure backend in Settings, or repackage with BB_INCLUDE_LOCAL=1.

msg.copied_history.zh: 已复制历史记录到剪贴板。
